name: tnd-monorepo
description: Truth and Dare multiplayer platform using NestJS microservices and Next.js

scripts.dev:question: npm run start:dev -w backend/question-service
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:gateway" "npm run dev:user" "npm run dev:room" "npm run dev:game" "npm run dev:question" "npm run dev:timer" "npm run dev:chat" "npm run dev:leaderboard" "npm run dev:friend" "npm run dev:notification" "npm run dev:moderation" "npm run dev:ai" "npm run dev:analytics" "npm run dev:payment"
